project.name: Autosport Manager 2027
project.description: A PC-based sports management game focused on team management and race tactics

target.audience_details: Experienced gamers familiar with F1, F2, other motorsports management games

scope.focus: Team management & real-time race simulation with 24 AI drivers
core_features: Real-time race simulation (24 cars, physics, AI, weather)
Tactical race planning (pit strategy, tire strategy, driver instructions)
Vehicle setup & development (aerodynamics, chassis, power unit)
Career progression system (driver morale, team performance)
Live race monitor (visual + data, multiple camera views)
Dynamic weather system (rain, temperature, track grip changes)
Tire management system (degradation model, temperature, compounds)

team.current_mode: Full Development (Design Mode focus for pre-production)

phase_1_preproduction.gdd: 100+ pages covering all game systems, UI, formulas, AI behavior
phase_1_preproduction.tdd: Technical architecture, engine choice, platform details, tools
phase_1_preproduction.prototype: Playable build of 1 race weekend with basic UI
phase_1_preproduction.roadmap: Weekly breakdown for main production phase

engine.recommendation: Unity (best balance for management UI-heavy game)

high_priority: Physics engine bottleneck with 24 simultaneous cars (FPS drop)
medium_priority: Memory leaks over long race sessions
